name: Kohl's Chulupa
recipeInstructions:
1. Place all ingredients in a large pot.
2. Cover with water.
3. Cook covered over low heat for 6 hours, adding more water as needed to keep the meat submerged.
4. Remove the cooked meat and set aside.
5. Continue cooking without the meat until the sauce thickens.
6. Shred the meat and return it to the pot.
7. Serve with Fritos, grated cheese, chopped onions, lettuce, tomatoes, chopped avocado, and taco sauce.
Taken from: IT NEVER TURNS OUT THE SAME WAY COOKBOOK
A Collection of Recipes from the Kitchen of Joyce and Clem Kohl
